Subject: Aiter's fused MXFP4 path blocked by Triton dtype support in evaluator

I’m testing fused FP4 quantization + GEMM in the AMD challenge environment and found an evaluator-side compatibility issue.

What I observe?

- When I run fused Triton path (`gemm_a16wfp4_preshuffle`), it fails with:`KeyError('float4_e2m1fn_x2')`  from `triton/_utils.py` → `canonicalize_dtype`.

The failure appears to come from Triton dtype canonicalization for FP4 (`float4_e2m1fn_x2`) in evaluator runtime.

Request:

Could you please verify and, if possible, align evaluator runtime to support fused FP4 path for `aiter 0.1.11`?

Thanks!

content:
Some comments on the compiler intrinsics/builtins and where to find docs/examples:

1. In most cases builtin translates into intrinsic. In most cases translation is 1:1. But not always. Many intrinsics directly or nearly directrly map to the ISA manual / shader programming guide insts
2. LLVM user guide https://llvm.org/docs/AMDGPUUsage.html
3. ISA https://www.amd.com/content/dam/amd/en/documents/instinct-tech-docs/instruction-set-architectures/amd-instinct-cdna4-instruction-set-architecture.pdf
4. Builtins: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/blob/main/clang/include/clang/Basic/BuiltinsAMDGPU.td
5. Intrinsics descriptions https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/blob/main/llvm/include/llvm/IR/IntrinsicsAMDGPU.td
6. Code examples: https://github.com/carlushuang/gcnasm/tree/master
7. https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/tree/main/llvm/test/CodeGen/AMDGPU
8. https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/tree/main/clang/test/CodeGenOpenCL and https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/tree/main/clang/test/SemaOpenCL
9. grep llvm repo
10. experiments
